nodes.context: Organized crime group based in Basilicata, Italy, formed in 1994.
Calabrian-based organized crime group, more powerful than Basilischi.

edges.evidence_quote: The conviction of many high-profile members of the clan caused the group to become fractured and fall further under the influence of the more powerful Calabrian -based 'Ndrangheta .
edges.context: Basilischi fell under the influence of 'Ndrangheta after convictions weakened the group.
